title: Young Lupin Meets a Wolf
overview: Teenage Arsène Lupin III meets Jigen for the first time in an epic encounter. However, the boys aren’t fast friends when they’re caught in a caper with a lady twice their age!

title: Hang Tight to the Treasure of the Train
overview: While aboard a train, Lupin challenges Jigen in more ways than one. Lupin plots to take a necklace off Jigen’s hands, but will the heist be derailed by The Eleventh Daughter?

title: The Grandson of the First Vies for Succession
overview: Two mysterious figures approach Lupin with a threatening invitation. It turns out that they’re messengers of Arsène Lupin I, Lupin’s grandfather! But what game is afoot?

title: Claim the Whiskey Pipe
overview: Lupin must lay low. He decides to build a secret base for Jigen and himself at school, however, making a hideout is more complicated than he expected...

title: The Man Who Operates in Secret
overview: Around Christmas, Lupin III meets a strange tattooed man. Meanwhile, a weapon has been stolen from a US military base by Lupin II.

title: Young Lupin Claims the Title of the Third
overview: With minutes left until the atomic cannon is fired, Lupin takes a step toward becoming a great thief.
